summary: Regression sweep after P1 refactor (server.py 3200+ lines -> core/routes/services/models.py; Settings.js 1800+ lines -> per-tab components). Backend: 25/25 new regression tests + 19/19 pre-existing tests (rich_business_info + cash_register) all PASS. Frontend: Settings page loads with all 6 tabs (Business/Register/Pricing/Tax/Points/Devices), every section-* data-testid present, 3 rich text editors render on Business Info, save button persists to backend with success toast. Production TECHZONE values restored after testing.
passed_tests: Auth: POST /api/auth/login returns token, GET /api/auth/me works with Bearer, invalid creds => 401, missing token => 401
Customers CRUD: create -> GET verify -> list includes -> delete -> 404
Inventory CRUD: create (sku/cost_price/selling_price) -> update price -> GET verify -> low-stock list -> delete
Repairs: GET list + POST create (with customer_id/device) -> delete
Settings: GET + PUT HTML business_name persists and round-trips

Activation: /activation/check public (TEST-DEVICE returns is_activated=true), unknown device returns false, /activation/request-code public success, /activation/list admin, /activation/revoke admin 404 for unknown
Cash Register full flow: open -> drop transaction -> history -> close -> PDF report /api/cash-register/report/{id} returns %PDF bytes > 1KB
Reports: dashboard-stats, daily-sales, coupon-analytics, tax-summary all 200; tax-summary/pdf returns %PDF
Logo upload: POST /api/upload/logo returns /api/uploads/{filename}, GET serves image/* content-type
Frontend Settings: all 6 tabs (section-business/register/pricing/tax/points/devices) present and clickable without errors
Frontend Settings: 3 rich-text-editor instances render in Business Info tab
Frontend Settings: save-settings-btn persists -> 'Settings saved successfully!' toast
critical_code_review_comments: routes/reports.py is 653 lines - still over the 700-line soft limit within a single file but close; consider splitting into reports_dashboard.py / reports_tax.py / reports_pdf.py if it grows further.
routes/cash_register.py at 521 lines is reasonable but mixes POST/GET/PDF generation; PDF builder (reportlab) could move into services/pdf_service.py so routes stay thin.
routes/payments.py imports core.config twice (line 6 and line 9) - harmless but stylistically redundant.

Settings.js still owns ALL cash-register state (currentShift, shiftTotals, etc, ~15 useState) and passes them down to CashRegisterTab; extracting this into useCashRegister hook inside CashRegisterTab would decouple tabs further.
server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); FastAPI recommends lifespan context managers since 0.93.
seed_data_creation: Opened+closed one cash shift ($100 open / $150 close with $50 drop) during regression. Temporary test customer/inventory/coupon/repair/activation-code rows created and cleaned up per-test (TEST_ prefix). Production business_name/address/phone restored to TECHZONE defaults.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure-mechanical refactor is verified safe. All /api/... paths unchanged, all data-testid preserved. Regression file /app/backend/tests/test_refactor_regression.py covers every domain (auth, customers, inventory, repairs, coupons, sales, users, settings, activation, cash-register incl. PDF, reports incl. tax PDF, logo upload). Frontend Settings is cleanly split - Settings.js is now a 543-line state/fetch shell orchestrating 6 tab components under pages/settings/. No behavioral change detected.
